race.comment: VIKING VALOUR (1) saluted at this track two runs ago. Fair effort last time out when second over 1100m at Julia Creek, beaten only a long neck. Yet to miss the placings from five starts at this circuit. Steps up a level but he is capable of running a bold race. MADAM BORODINA (3) was well fancied last start over 1200m at Stamford when second, beaten 3.5 lengths. Where there's smoke there's fire and deserves another chance. XINGXING (4) was far from disgraced when third last start after being prominent at the turn over 1200m at Oak Park, beaten 2.75 lengths. That followed a win at Laura-Qld the start prior. Ideally placed and is sure to bounce back to form. THREEFOLD (5) finished second two runs back at Richmond Qld then improved last time out to score by 3.5 lengths over 1200m at Stamford. Best figures measure up and is sure to run well.
